409.description: Conflict (code: EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE_ACTIVE_ENTRY, BACKUP_ENTRY_INVALID_LINK, REGISTRATION_NOT_OPEN, REGISTRATION_CLOSED, EVENT_NOT_OPEN)

includeDriverNote.description: If true, include driver note block for accepted_open_payment/rejected mails when a note exists.

post.description: Queues a deterministic payment reminder quick action for a single entry. With allowDuplicate=true, duplicate checks are bypassed and each call enqueues a new outbox item. Queued reminders are visible via GET /admin/mail/outbox for the same eventId and processed by the same dispatcher/retry pipeline as other outbox mails.

templateId.description: Optional alternative template key. Defaults to payment_reminder when omitted.

allowDuplicate.description: Force resend mode. If true, duplicate-skip is bypassed and a new outbox record is created on each call.

reason.description: Present when queued=0, for example duplicate, not_allowed, no_recipient.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an entry. Supports optional deleteReason in request body. Idempotent for already-deleted entries.

patch.description: Updates acceptance status. For acceptanceStatus=shortlist no lifecycle mail is sent, even when sendLifecycleMail=true. Optional includeDriverNoteInLifecycleMail controls whether driverNote is included for accepted_open_payment/rejected mails.
Confirms payment on entry level. Invoice may be created transparently if missing.
Manually adjusts entry payment totals/paid amounts. Works without pre-existing invoice; backend handles internal ledger/invoice creation as needed.
Saves entry notes only. Does not trigger acceptance status transitions or lifecycle/outbox mail actions.

guardianConsentAccepted.description: Muss true sein, wenn Fahrer unter 18 ist.
